content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6-max

## Summary

Reviewed the ProposeNewBead handler implementation across service.rs and success_reconciliation.rs. All 794 tests pass, clippy is clean. The implementation correctly adds: (1) journal-based idempotency via load_existing_proposed_bead_creation, (2) recovery of previously-created beads by matching title+description, (3) defensive reclassification to planned-elsewhere when title matches but description doesn't, (4) dependency wiring via br dep add, (5) conservative threshold warnings at >2 creations per pass, and (6) error propagation from reconcile_proposed_beads_after_success back to reconcile_success. The three-layer idempotency (journal replay → bead recovery → planned-elsewhere fallback) is well-ordered and each layer is correctly tested. The behavioral change from non-blocking to blocking error propagation is appropriate given the idempotency guarantees. No bugs, safety problems, or correctness gaps found.

## Amendments

None.
